MINI MINUTES: COURT CALL APPEARANCES:
John Little, Esq. of Hollins Law. 714-558-9119 for plaintiff and moving party Transworld Systems, Inc

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
PLAINTIFF TRANSWORLD SYSTEMS, INC.'S Motion To Deem Admitted Plaintiff's Requests For Admissions, Set One, And For Sanctions.
Denied. The responses have now been served. No sanctions. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING PERTY OF HIS INTENT TO APPEAR. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not Reported (301/PJB)
